// README: Copy this file to agentflow.config.json and customize for your setup.
// docs: All fields are optional. Remove sections you don't need.
// aliases: Map raw agent IDs to canonical names (deduplication across renames)
// skipFiles: Filenames to skip during trace scanning (operational logs, not traces)
// skipDirectories: Directory names to skip during recursive scanning
// discoveryPaths: Additional directories to auto-discover and watch for traces
// systemdServices: Systemd unit names to query for process/directory discovery
// agentDetection: Rules for identifying agents from file paths and names

agentDetection.// pathPatterns: Map path substrings to agent IDs
agentDetection.// filePatterns: Map filename regex to agent IDs (${match} = first capture group)

// processPreference: When multiple process registries exist, prefer one over another
